name: Xiuhong Li
title: PhD · Deep Learning System & GPU Architecture
bio: I currently serve as Vice President at Infinigence AI, where I am responsible for Model as a Service (MaaS) technologies. I received both my bachelor's degree and Ph.D. from Peking University. Prior to joining Infinigence AI, I served Peking University as Research Assistant Professor, and SenseTime as Research Director, respectively

researchInterests.title: Deep Learning System
researchInterests.description: System design for LLM including inference, training, and applications

researchInterests.title: GPU Architecture
researchInterests.description: Architecture design for large scale datacenter

news.text: I will give a presentation at QCon 2026
